steps.title: Use identical lines
steps.content: A system has infinitely many solutions only when the two equations describe the same line. Therefore, the second equation must have the same slope as the given equation.

steps.title: Read the slope
steps.content:
The equation is in slope-intercept form.
$$
y=\frac{2}{9}x+8
$$
The coefficient of $x$ is the slope, so the required slope is 
$$
\frac{2}{9}
$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph the given line and compare slopes in the choices. The only choice with the same slope is $$ \frac{2}{9} $$ The answer is C.
